details.description: A bright coastal scene on Rottnest Island showing a white cylindrical lighthouse set on a low limestone headland above a sandy cove. The tower has a gallery and lantern atop a tapering masonry shaft, painted white. A timber boardwalk and stairs climb the vegetated dune/rock slope up to the lighthouse. In the foreground are coastal grasses and, below, a sheltered beach with light sand, scattered rocks, and small surf; a few visitors are on the shoreline. Offshore are dark reefy rocks and the open Indian Ocean under a blue sky with scattered cumulus clouds. The setting matches Bathurst Point overlooking Pinky Beach.

details.description: A coastal scene on Rottnest Island, Western Australia. A tall cylindrical stone lighthouse with a white lantern sits atop a grassy, rocky promontory connected to the beach by a winding wooden staircase. The surrounding beach is sandy with a few people enjoying the shore, while turquoise sea laps gentle rocks at the water's edge. In the foreground, windswept dune grasses frame the scene under a bright blue sky punctuated by fluffy white clouds. The overall feel is a sunny, tranquil lighthouse overlooking the shoreline.

details.description: A vertical, wide-angle photograph capturing a coastal scene on a bright, sunny day. The dominant subject is the Bathurst Lighthouse, a white cylindrical stone tower with a lantern room, situated atop a rocky, scrub-covered hill. A wooden staircase winds up the hill towards the lighthouse. The sky is a deep azure blue, filled with large, fluffy white cumulus clouds. In the immediate foreground, tall dune grasses and coastal vegetation frame the bottom of the image. To the left, the white sands of Pinky Beach curve along the coastline, meeting the turquoise and teal waters of the Indian Ocean. Several people are visible walking on the beach and exploring the rocky outcrops near the water's edge.

details.description: A vertical shot of Bathurst Lighthouse standing atop a grassy, rocky hill overlooking Pinky Beach on Rottnest Island, Australia. The lighthouse is a white, cylindrical stone tower with a lantern room at the top. A wooden staircase and path lead up the side of the hill to the lighthouse. Below, a crescent-shaped sandy beach is populated with several people. The ocean water is a vibrant turquoise near the shore, transitioning to a deeper blue further out, with dark rocky outcrops visible in the water. The foreground is dominated by tall, sun-bleached coastal grasses. The sky is a bright, clear blue with several large, fluffy white clouds.

details.description: A white cylindrical masonry lighthouse with a gallery and lantern stands on a low rocky headland above a sandy cove. Timber stairs and a boardwalk climb from the beach up to the lighthouse. Low coastal heath and dune grasses surround the site, with turquoise ocean and offshore rocks to the left. A few beachgoers are visible. The structure and setting strongly match Bathurst Lighthouse on Rottnest Island (Wadjemup), Western Australia, viewed from the nearby Pinky Beach area on a bright day with scattered cumulus clouds.

details.description: A coastal scene with a tall cylindrical lighthouse perched on a rocky hill overlooking a sandy beach. The lighthouse is built of light-colored stone with a white lantern room at the top and a small gallery. A wooden staircase and railing wind up the hillside to the structure. In the foreground, beach grasses sway over dune terrain, while people enjoy the small cove and the clear turquoise sea to the left. Dark rocky outcrops jut into the water, and a bright blue sky with fluffy white clouds forms a dramatic backdrop.

details.description: A vertical outdoor photograph capturing a scenic coastal landscape under a bright blue sky with large, fluffy white cumulus clouds. The focal point is the Bathurst Lighthouse, a cylindrical stone tower with a white lantern room, situated atop a rocky, scrub-covered hill. A wooden staircase leads up the hill towards the lighthouse. Below the hill, to the left, is a sandy beach (Pinky Beach) where several people are walking and relaxing near the turquoise water's edge. Dark rocky outcrops are visible in the ocean. The immediate foreground is filled with tall, dry coastal grasses and dune vegetation, framing the scene.

Rottnest Island
Western Australia

details.description: A vertical photograph capturing the Bathurst Lighthouse on Rottnest Island, Western Australia. The lighthouse is a white, cylindrical stone tower with a lantern room at its peak, situated on a prominent, scrub-covered hill. A wooden staircase and path wind up the hillside toward the structure. Below the hill, a sandy beach known as Pinky Beach meets the turquoise waters of the Indian Ocean. Several people are visible on the beach and near the water's edge. The foreground is dominated by tall, sun-bleached coastal grasses. The sky is a deep blue with large, fluffy white clouds scattered across it.
